title: haplopappus spinulosus subsp. incisifolius
intro: Haplopappus spinulosus subsp. incisifolius, also known as the Spiny Haplopappus, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Haplopappus spinulosus subsp. incisifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against bacteria and fungi. Haplopappus spinulosus subsp. incisifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots and leaves can be used in topical applications for skin and wound care.
